div1.entryFree: Godild or God 'ild, a phrase used in returning thanks (corrupted from God yield, cf. Ant. IV, 2, 33): G. you for your last company, As III, 3, 76 (== thank you). I like him very well. G. you, sir, V, 4, 56. how you shall bid G. us for your pains, Mcb. I, 6, 13. how do you, pretty lady? Well, G. you, Hml. IV, 5, 41.
